records.question: Which ships named HM Schooner Hotspur were built in 1998, have class KR and type Panamax, and have captains whose class is Armed schooner?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE captain.class = 'Armed schooner' AND ship.type = 'Panamax' AND ship.built_year = 1998.0 AND ship.class = 'KR' AND ship.name = 'HM Schooner Hotspur'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ship.Ship_ID
FROM Ship
JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID
WHERE Ship.Name = 'HM Schooner Hotspur'
  AND Ship.Built_Year = 1998
  AND Ship.Class = 'KR'
  AND Ship.Type = 'Panamax'
  AND captain.Class = 'Armed schooner'

records.question: Which ships are Panamax type, belong to the GL class, and fly the Malta flag?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
WHERE ship.type = 'Panamax' AND ship.class = 'GL' AND ship.flag = 'Malta'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Ship.Ship_ID FROM Ship WHERE Ship.Type = 'Panamax' AND Ship.Class = 'GL' AND Ship.Flag = 'Malta'

records.question: Which ships built in 1998 or earlier have captains assigned to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE ship.built_year <= 1998.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Ship.Ship_ID
FROM Ship
JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID
WHERE Ship.Built_Year <= 1998

records.question: Which ships that were built in 1997 have captains assigned to them?
records.gold_sql:

records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ship.Ship_ID
FROM Ship

records.question: Which ships belong to the KR class and are of the Panamax type?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
WHERE ship.class = 'KR' AND ship.type = 'Panamax'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Ship_ID FROM Ship WHERE Class = 'KR' AND Type = 'Panamax'

records.question: What ships named HMS Gorgon flagged in Panama were built in 1998 or later and have a Midshipman captain named Captain Beves Conway whose class is Third-rate ship of the line and type is Panamax?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE ship.flag = 'Panama' AND captain.name = 'Captain Beves Conway' AND captain.rank = 'Midshipman' AND ship.type = 'Panamax' AND ship.name = 'HMS Gorgon' AND captain.class = 'Third-rate ship of the line' AND ship.built_year >= 1998.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ship.Ship_ID
FROM Ship
JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID
WHERE Ship.Name = 'HMS Gorgon'
  AND Ship.Flag = 'Panama'
  AND Ship.Built_Year >= 1998
  AND captain.Rank = 'Midshipman'
  AND captain.Name = 'Captain Beves Conway'
  AND captain.Class = 'Third-rate ship of the line'
  AND Ship.Type = 'Panamax'

records.question: What ship has the name HM Sloop Sparrow, is of the Panamax type, was built in 1997, and belongs to the KR class?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
WHERE ship.type = 'Panamax' AND ship.name = 'HM Sloop Sparrow' AND ship.built_year = 1997.0 AND ship.class = 'KR'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Ship_ID FROM Ship WHERE Name = 'HM Sloop Sparrow' AND Type = 'Panamax' AND Built_Year = 1997 AND Class = 'KR'

records.question: What ship has the name HMS Destiny and was built in 1998?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
WHERE ship.name = 'HMS Destiny' AND ship.built_year = 1998.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT Ship_ID FROM Ship WHERE Name = 'HMS Destiny' AND Built_Year = 1998

records.question: Which ships named HMS Gorgon were built in 1998 or earlier, have class KR, and are captained by 60-year-old Captain Gilbert Pears commanding a Third-rate ship of the line?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
JOIN captain ON ship.ship_id = captain.ship_id
WHERE ship.built_year <= 1998.0 AND ship.name = 'HMS Gorgon' AND captain.class = 'Third-rate ship of the line' AND captain.age = '60' AND ship.class = 'KR' AND captain.name = 'Captain Gilbert Pears'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Ship.Ship_ID
FROM Ship
JOIN captain ON Ship.Ship_ID = captain.Ship_ID
WHERE Ship.Name = 'HMS Gorgon'
  AND Ship.Built_Year <= 1998
  AND Ship.Class = 'KR'
  AND captain.Name = 'Gilbert Pears'
  AND captain.age = '60'
  AND captain.Class = 'Third-rate ship of the line'
